name: motor-output
description: Channel-based motor output and action dispatch — Primary Motor Cortex / SMA analogue. Receives ActionSpec from agent-runtime, selects dispatch channel, executes with error policy, and emits MotorFeedback corollary discharge to executive-agent.

skills.name: Dispatch Action
skills.description: Execute an ActionSpec through the appropriate output channel (HTTP, A2A, file, render)

skills.name: Get Dispatch Status
skills.description: Query the status of a dispatched action by action_id

skills.name: List Channels
skills.description: List available output channels and their health status

skills.name: Abort Dispatch
skills.description: Abort a pending or in-flight dispatch

neuroanatomical-basis: Primary Motor Cortex (M1) population code for parallel channel dispatch; Supplementary Motor Area (SMA/pre-SMA) pre-action corollary discharge signal; spinal cord efferent channels (HTTP, A2A, file, render)
